---
title: "apply_transform"
generated: true
description: "Apply a recovered transform to an in-memory image / label map."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register.recipes`](../nitrix-register-recipes.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:apply_transform -->
```python
apply_transform(image: Float[Array, '*spatial'], result: object, *, reference_shape: Optional[tuple[int, ...]] = None, method: Optional[Interpolator] = None, mode: BoundaryMode = 'constant', cval: float = 0.0) -> Float[Array, '*rspatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:apply_transform -->
Apply a recovered transform to an in-memory image / label map.

Resamples `image` -- an array in the **moving** frame of the registration
that produced `result` (a second contrast, a label map, an atlas) -- onto
the reference (fixed) grid by the recovered transform.  Dispatches on the
result: a homogeneous matrix ([`rigid_register`](../nitrix-register-recipes/rigid_register.qmd) / [`affine_register`](../nitrix-register-recipes/affine_register.qmd)
-- the self-contained `fixed -> moving` voxel map) or a dense displacement
field ([`greedy_syn_register`](../nitrix-register/greedy_syn_register.qmd) /
[`diffeomorphic_demons_register`](../nitrix-register-diffeomorphic/diffeomorphic_demons_register.qmd)).  In-memory resampling only -- image
**file** I/O is out of scope.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:apply_transform -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Single-channel array to resample, on the registration's moving grid. |
| `result` | `object` | — | — | A [`RegistrationResult`](../nitrix-register/RegistrationResult.qmd) (uses `.matrix`) or a diffeomorphic result (uses `.displacement`). |
| `reference_shape` | `Optional[tuple[int, ...]]` | — | `None` | Output grid for a **matrix** result; `None` -> `image.shape` (correct when moving and fixed share a grid, the [`IndexSpace`](../nitrix-register/IndexSpace.qmd) norm -- pass the fixed shape for [`WorldSpace`](../nitrix-register/WorldSpace.qmd) / differing grids). A displacement result defines its own output grid. |
| `method` | `Optional[Interpolator]` | — | `None` | Interpolation kernel; `None` -> `NearestNeighbour` for an **integer** `image` (label-preserving, no interpolation bleed) and `Linear` otherwise. For anti-aliased multi-label resampling pass `MultiLabel(labels=...)`; for overlap of a warped label map see `nitrix.metrics.dice` / `nitrix.metrics.jaccard`. |
| `mode` | `BoundaryMode` | — | `'constant'` | Out-of-bounds handling (default `'constant'` 0 -- background). |
| `cval` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Out-of-bounds handling (default `'constant'` 0 -- background). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*rspatial`. `image` resampled onto the reference grid (same dtype as `image`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:apply_transform -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `*rspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`rspatial`) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
